name: Mitigate
short_description: This game captivates every player with its warm animated style, featuring soft yet vivid colors that create a world both dreamy and lifelike.
detailed_description:
This game attracts every player with its warm animation style, and its soft and vivid colors create a dreamy yet realistic world.

Every detail from the character to the background has been carefully crafted, immersing players in the environment.

The gameplay is unique, mainly revolving around treasure hunting in the room.

Players need to obtain prompts through conversations with NPCs and find usable items in two rooms.

The game tests players' visual acuity, observation ability, and thinking ability.

Gameplay

You need to collect supplies

Then place the correct materials in the correct location (you need to guess where the correct location is?)

Operation method

Left mouse button
